texto: Having girlfriends is... I can't do it. It doesn't mean I don't hang out with girls. It just means that I don't like being in a relationship, because it makes things very complicated. The one piece of advice that I listen to adults on - because I don't listen to adults when it comes to most things - is that I'm too young to have a girlfriend.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jaden Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Having girlfriends is... I can't do it. It doesn't mean I don't hang out with girls. It just mean…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, advice, listen pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e listen.

frase_original: Having girlfriends is... I can't do it. It doesn't mean I don't hang out with girls. It just means that I don't like being in a relationship, because it makes things very complicated. The one piece of advice that I listen to adults on - because I don't listen to adults when it comes to most things - is that I'm too young to have a girlfriend.
